title: Personalised Ribbon -10mm Width - Custom Printed - Personalised Printed Ribbons - Various Lengths - 35 Ribbon Colours - Perfect for Birthdays, Christenings, Baby Showers, Weddings, and So Much More
features: ✔️Add that finishing touch to your special occasion with our Personalised Printed Ribbons. All our ribbons are premium high quality double faced satin ensuring the soft luxurious feel on both sides. Our service prides itself in making custom ribbons exact to your requirements.
✔️We have 35 vibrant colours (See Photo) for you to choose from along with a large variety of foil print colours and fonts to choose from.
✔️You can even add small icons (See Photos) alongside your text to add that extra uniqueness to your product.
✔️Our ribbons are perfect for adding that personal touch to any occasion ranging from Weddings, Birthdays, and Anniversaries to religious events such as Diwali, Eid and Christmas.
✔️You could even elevate the look of your business packaging by printing your business/brand name onto our ribbons to give your clients a lasting impression of your business.
✔️ Your personalised message will be repeated along the entire length of the ribbon, with a gap of approximately 2-3 cm between each repeat.
description: ✔️Design your own personalised message on our double-faced satin ribbons. Select from a wide range of ribbon colours, print colours, fonts and icons to add that special touch to any event. Perfect for Weddings, Birthdays, Memorials, Christenings, Baby showers and all Seasonal/Religious events! ✔️We have 5 different width ribbons to choose from, allowing you to choose the perfect size depending on intended use. Whether it’s wrapping small or large gifts, birthday/wedding banners, small individual favours and so much more.
